name: Steam Profile
description: Steam user profile including persona name, avatar, level, location, and account metadata

profileUrl.description: URL to the user's Steam Community profile

avatarUrl.description: URL to the user's full-size avatar image

realName.description: Real name if set by the user

accountCreated.description: When the Steam account was created

lastLogoff.description: Last time the user was seen online

personaState.description: Online status (0=offline, 1=online, 2=busy, 3=away, 4=snooze, 5=looking to trade, 6=looking to play)
